---
title: "Hello new visitor !!! 🐈"
---

Welcome to my website made for everyone who wants to learn about modern tools for an efficient writting of research manuscripts: $\LaTeX$, Zotero, Rmarkdown, Python and R. The importance of this tools also stands out for writing books, blogs and websites with ease like this one made by using [Quarto](https://quarto.org/docs/websites).

::: callout-important
Most of my articles are written in **spanish** because detailed but awesome information is not widespread in these topics for new hispanoamerican students yet. 
:::

<!-- [about](about.qmd)
[about](about.qmd#section) -->
